item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the next SMS parking reminder as another local patch, names the repeated pattern across door, sign-in, break-line, and parking failures, moves upstream to the whole guest arrival chain and ownership, and recommends single-source consolidation plus retain/merge/delete decisions rather than adding another overlay."}
